aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Cabrera & Sons due to limited conversational content and inadequate authority signals.
quick_wins: Implement FAQ content with structured data to address common HVAC queries.
Update NAP consistency between the website and GBP.

critical_issues: Phone number mismatch between website and GBP.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is moderate, with a critical phone number discrepancy.
action_items: Update the website phone number to match GBP: (267) 300-0838.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI recognition.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to emergency HVAC services and local expertise.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding FAQ content with structured data to address common HVAC questions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting NATE certifications and emergency services to establish authority.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise visible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, Cabrera & Sons is missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: The website lacks FAQ content and structured data, causing AI models to overlook the business for key queries.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO strategy will integrate FAQ content, structured data, and authority signals to make Cabrera & Sons the go-to HVAC expert for AI assistants.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are already capturing market share—act now to stay ahead.

email_subject_line: Maximize Your AI Visibility: Boost Leads with Our AEO Strategy
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your visibility with AI assistants.
cta: Let’s schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI-driven growth.
